benchmark_honesty_caveat: Autonomous second-round repair-context selector output. Hidden aligned target Lean declarations, statements, names, and proofs are not included. Mathlib signatures here are included only after Lean #check hydration.

checked_signatures.name: MvPolynomial.esymm_eq_sum_subtype
checked_signatures.signature:
MvPolynomial.esymm_eq_sum_subtype.{u_5, u_6} (σ : Type u_5) (R : Type u_6) [CommSemiring R] [Fintype σ] (n : ℕ) :
  MvPolynomial.esymm σ R n = ∑ t, ∏ i ∈ ↑t, MvPolynomial.X i
checked_signatures.why_needed: To rewrite esymm as a sum over subsets of size n. Then we can argue that when n > Fintype.card σ, the set of subsets of size n is empty, so the sum is 0.

checked_signatures.name: SzemerediRegularity.edgeDensity_chunk_not_uniform
checked_signatures.signature:
SzemerediRegularity.edgeDensity_chunk_not_uniform.{u_1} {α : Type u_1} [Fintype α] [DecidableEq α]
  {P : Finpartition univ} {hP : P.IsEquipartition} {G : SimpleGraph α} [DecidableRel G.Adj] {ε : ℝ} {U V : Finset α}
  [Nonempty α] (hPα : #P.parts * 16 ^ #P.parts ≤ Fintype.card α) (hPε : 100 ≤ 4 ^ #P.parts * ε ^ 5) (hε₁ : ε ≤ 1)
  {hU : U ∈ P.parts} {hV : V ∈ P.parts} (hUVne : U ≠ V) (hUV : ¬G.IsUniform ε U V) :
  ↑(G.edgeDensity U V) ^ 2 - ε ^ 5 / 25 + ε ^ 4 / 3 ≤
    (∑ ab ∈ (SzemerediRegularity.chunk hP G ε hU).parts.product (SzemerediRegularity.chunk hP G ε hV).parts,
        ↑(G.edgeDensity ab.1 ab.2) ^ 2) /
      16 ^ #P.parts
checked_signatures.why_needed: Checked fallback candidate for failed request Finset.card_eq_zero_of_not_nonempty: To show that the Finset of subsets of size n is empty when n > card σ, so its sum is 0.

checked_signatures.name: Finset.filter_eq_empty_iff
checked_signatures.signature:
Finset.filter_eq_empty_iff.{u_1} {α : Type u_1} {p : α → Prop} [DecidablePred p] {s : Finset α} :
  filter p s = ∅ ↔ ∀ ⦃x : α⦄, x ∈ s → ¬p x

missing_or_uncertain_context.item: A lemma that MvPolynomial.esymm σ R n = 0 when n > Fintype.card σ, or a way to prove it from the sum-over-subsets definition.

proof_strategy_notes.failure_analysis: The attempted proof used MvPolynomial.esymm_eq_zero_of_lt, which does not exist in Mathlib. The fallback candidates do not provide a direct theorem for esymm = 0 when n > Fintype.card σ. The proof must be constructed from the definition of esymm as a sum over subsets of size n, which is empty when n > card σ.
proof_strategy_notes.proof_strategy_note: Use the local predecessor theorem e_eq_sum_prod_subsets to rewrite e n as a sum over subsets of size n of Finset.univ (Fin N). Then note that when n > N = Fintype.card (Fin N), the set of subsets of size n is empty, so the sum is 0. This avoids the need for MvPolynomial.esymm_eq_zero_of_lt. The proof will use Finset.card_eq_zero_of_not_nonempty or a direct argument that powersetCard n (univ : Finset (Fin N)) is empty when n > card (univ).

units.repair_strategy_note: Use the local predecessor theorem e_eq_sum_prod_subsets to rewrite e n as a sum over subsets of size n of Finset.univ (Fin N). Then note that when n > N = Fintype.card (Fin N), the set of subsets of size n is empty, so the sum is 0. This avoids the need for MvPolynomial.esymm_eq_zero_of_lt. The proof will use Finset.card_eq_zero_of_not_nonempty or a direct argument that powersetCard n (univ : Finset (Fin N)) is empty when n > card (univ).
